name: space metric schema validator accepts a metric with all section 2.11 required fields
command:
printf 'metrics:
  - id: space-perf-rubric-pass-rate
    dimension: performance
    source: rubric-runs/last.json
    unit: ratio
    reporting_window: 7d
    privacy: local-only
    opt_in: false
' > space/metrics.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/validate-metric-schema.sh" --metrics space/metrics.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && grep -q 'metrics_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
